props.name: items
props.description: Panel definitions.

props.name: allowMultiple
props.description: Allow more than one panel open at a time.

props.name: defaultOpenIds
props.description: Ids of panels open on first render.

ActionMenu.name: ActionMenu
ActionMenu.description:
Domain-neutral overflow menu for row, toolbar, and contextual actions.
Renders a `MoreHorizontal` {@link IconButton} trigger unless overridden.

props.name: align
props.description: Menu alignment relative to the trigger. Defaults to `'end'`.

props.name: icon
props.description: Icon for the default trigger button. Defaults to `MoreHorizontal`.

props.name: items
props.description: Flat list of actions. Use `sections` instead for grouped/headed menus.

props.name: label
props.description: Accessible label for the default trigger.

props.name: sections
props.description: Grouped actions with optional section headings.

props.name: size
props.description: Size of the default trigger button.

props.name: trigger
props.description: Replace the default overflow trigger entirely.

ActionSheet.name: ActionSheet
ActionSheet.description:
Mobile-first bottom sheet presenting a vertical list of actions.
Desktop renders the same sheet centered at the bottom with max width.

props.name: actions
props.description: Action buttons rendered in the sheet.

props.name: onClose
props.description: Called when the sheet is dismissed.

props.name: open
props.description: Whether the sheet is visible.

props.name: cancelLabel
props.description: Label for the cancel button. Defaults to "Cancel".

props.name: description
props.description: Supporting text under the title.

props.name: items
props.description: Feed entries in chronological order.

props.name: empty
props.description: Content shown when there are no items.

AIPrompt.name: AIPrompt
AIPrompt.description:
Prompt input surface for AI features: suggestion chips, multiline input with
Cmd/Ctrl+Enter submit, busy/stop state, and an output slot. Transport-free —
wire your own model call in onSubmit.

props.name: onSubmit
props.description: Called with the prompt text on submit. Wire your model call here.

props.name: busy
props.description: Streaming/working state — shows stop affordance and disables input.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables the input and submit affordance.

props.name: hint
props.description: Footer hint, e.g. model name or token budget.

props.name: label
props.description: Accessible label for the input (visually hidden). Defaults to `'AI prompt'`.

props.name: onStop
props.description: Called when the user clicks stop during a busy/streaming response.

props.name: output
props.description: Rendered output region (markdown, streamed text, components).

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Placeholder text for the input. Defaults to `'Ask anything…'`.

props.name: suggestions
props.description: Quick-start suggestion chips shown above the input.

props.name: dismissible
props.description: Show a close button that hides the alert.

AnimatedList.name: AnimatedList
AnimatedList.description:
List that animates items in and out as the array changes — premium feel for
notifications, activity feeds, and search results. Honors reduced motion and
relies on the app-level `MotionConfig reducedMotion="user"`.

props.name: getKey
props.description: Returns a stable key per item so motion can track add/remove/reorder.

props.name: items
props.description: Items to render; add/remove drives enter/exit animations.

props.name: renderItem
props.description: Renders a single item.

props.name: itemClassName
props.description: Extra classes applied to each item wrapper.

props.name: stagger
props.description: Per-item enter delay for a cascading reveal.

AnimatedNumber.name: AnimatedNumber
AnimatedNumber.description:
Count-up number that animates from its previous value to the next. Snaps
instantly when the user prefers reduced motion. Drives premium stat displays.

props.name: duration
props.description: Animation duration in seconds.

props.name: format
props.description: Format the displayed number. Defaults to locale integer formatting.

props.name: position
props.description: CSS positioning (e.g. static, sticky, fixed).

props.name: tone
props.description: Background/foreground colour scheme.

props.name: data
props.description: Row data; each object holds the x value and every series value.

props.name: series
props.description: Series to plot, each mapping a data key to a label/colour.

props.name: xKey
props.description: Key in each datum used for the x axis.

props.name: height
props.description: Chart height in pixels.

props.name: showLegend
props.description: Show the series legend.

props.name: onChange
props.description: Called with the chosen value (or null when cleared).

props.name: value
props.description: Currently selected value, or null.

props.name: clearable
props.description: Show a clear button to reset the selection.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables the input and prevents selection.

props.name: emptyMessage
props.description: Message shown when no options match the query.

props.name: name
props.description: Form field name for the underlying input.

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Placeholder text for the input when nothing is selected.

props.name: renderOption
props.description: Custom renderer for an option row.

props.name: size
props.description: Control size.

props.name: alt
props.description: Image alt text (defaults to `name`).

props.name: initials
props.description: Explicit initials override (otherwise derived from `name`).

props.name: name
props.description: Full name used to derive initials and the alt text.

props.name: src
props.description: Image URL. Falls back to initials when absent or it fails to load.

AvatarStack.name: AvatarStack
AvatarStack.description:
Overflow-aware grouped avatars driven by data instead of children.
Renders a `+N` chip once the count exceeds `max`.

props.name: avatars
props.description: Avatar data to render in the stack.

props.name: max
props.description: Max avatars shown before collapsing the rest into a `+N` chip. Defaults to `4`.

props.name: shape
props.description: Shape applied to every avatar in the stack. Defaults to `'circle'`.

props.name: size
props.description: Size applied to every avatar in the stack. Defaults to `'md'`.

props.name: blur
props.description: Apply a backdrop blur to content behind the overlay.

props.name: open
props.description: Whether the backdrop is shown.

props.name: dot
props.description: Render a leading status dot in the current colour.

props.name: tone
props.description: Alias of `variant`, kept for ergonomic status labelling.

props.name: variant
props.description: Semantic colour. `error` is accepted as an alias of `danger`.

props.name: children
props.description: Banner message body.

props.name: tone
props.description: Semantic colour of the banner.

props.name: actions
props.description: Trailing action buttons.

props.name: dismissLabel
props.description: Accessible label for the dismiss button.

props.name: full
props.description: Stretch edge-to-edge with no rounded corners.

props.name: icon
props.description: Custom leading icon; defaults to a tone-appropriate icon.

props.name: onDismiss
props.description: Called when the dismiss button is clicked; omit to hide it.

props.name: data
props.description: Row data; each object holds the x value and every series value.

props.name: series
props.description: Series to plot, each mapping a data key to a label/colour.

props.name: xKey
props.description: Key in each datum used for the x axis.

props.name: height
props.description: Chart height in pixels.

props.name: showLegend
props.description: Show the series legend.

props.name: value
props.description: Value encoded as a barcode.

props.name: height
props.description: Bar height in pixels.

props.name: interactive
props.description: Subtle lift + accent border on hover.

BentoGrid.name: BentoGrid
BentoGrid.description:
Asymmetric "bento" grid for premium dashboard and marketing layouts. Cells
declare their own span via {@link BentoCard}.

BorderBeam.name: BorderBeam
BorderBeam.description:
Surface with a light that travels around its border — a premium accent for
upsell cards, active states, and hero panels. The beam is purely decorative
and pauses under `prefers-reduced-motion`.

props.name: duration
props.description: Full rotation duration in seconds.

props.name: size
props.description: Beam thickness in pixels.

props.name: items
props.description: Navigation destinations.

props.name: onChange
props.description: Called with the value of the selected destination.

props.name: value
props.description: Value of the currently active destination.

props.name: items
props.description: Trail entries from root to current page.

props.name: separator
props.description: Custom separator between items. Defaults to a chevron.

props.name: isLoading
props.description: Show a loading spinner and disable the button while an action is in flight.

props.name: data
props.description: OHLC data points.

props.name: height
props.description: Chart height in pixels.

props.name: showVolume
props.description: Render a volume sub-chart below the candles.

props.name: showZoom
props.description: Show the zoom/pan data slider.

props.name: padding
props.description: Inner padding scale.

props.name: children
props.description: Slides to render, one per child.

props.name: options
props.description: Embla carousel options (loop, align, drag, etc.).

props.name: showArrows
props.description: Show the previous/next arrow controls.

props.name: showDots
props.description: Show the dot pagination indicators.

props.name: messages
props.description: Conversation messages in chronological order.

props.name: onSend
props.description: Called with the message text when the user sends.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disable the composer.

props.name: emptyState
props.description: Content shown when there are no messages.

props.name: loading
props.description: Show a loading state for an in-flight response.

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Placeholder for the composer input.

props.name: typingIndicator
props.description: Show an animated typing indicator.

props.name: checked
props.description: Controlled checked state.

props.name: description
props.description: Secondary helper text under the label.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disable interaction and dim the control.

props.name: indeterminate
props.description: Render the mixed/indeterminate visual state.

props.name: label
props.description: Visible label beside the checkbox.

props.name: onChange
props.description: Called with the new checked state on toggle.

props.name: onChange
props.description: Called with the next array of selected values when any box toggles.

props.name: options
props.description: Selectable options rendered as checkboxes.

props.name: value
props.description: Currently selected option values (controlled).

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables every checkbox in the group.

props.name: invalid
props.description: Marks the group invalid for validation styling (sets `data-invalid`).

props.name: name
props.description: Shared form field name applied to each checkbox.

props.name: orientation
props.description: Stacking direction of the checkboxes. Defaults to `'vertical'`.

props.name: children
props.description: Chip label content.

props.name: icon
props.description: Optional leading icon.

props.name: interactive
props.description: Render as a button (clickable/selectable) rather than a static span.

props.name: onRemove
props.description: When provided, renders a remove (×) button that calls this handler.

props.name: removeLabel
props.description: Accessible label for the remove button.

props.name: size
props.description: Chip size.

props.name: tone
props.description: Semantic colour.

props.name: variant
props.description: Fill style: solid, soft, or outline.

props.name: value
props.description: Current progress value, 0 to `max`.

props.name: label
props.description: Accessible label / centre caption.

props.name: max
props.description: Maximum value. Defaults to 100.

props.name: size
props.description: Diameter in pixels.

props.name: thickness
props.description: Ring stroke width in pixels.

props.name: code
props.description: Source code to render.

props.name: language
props.description: Language for syntax highlighting (e.g. "ts", "bash").

props.name: maxHeight
props.description: Max height in pixels before the block scrolls.

props.name: showCopy
props.description: Show a copy-to-clipboard button.

props.name: showLineNumbers
props.description: Show a line-number gutter.

props.name: value
props.description: Current editor contents.

props.name: height
props.description: Fixed height (CSS length).

props.name: language
props.description: Language for syntax highlighting.

props.name: lineNumbers
props.description: Show the line-number gutter.

props.name: minHeight
props.description: Minimum height when auto-growing.

props.name: onChange
props.description: Called with the new contents on edit.

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Placeholder shown when empty.

props.name: readOnly
props.description: Render read-only (no editing).

props.name: theme
props.description: Colour theme; `auto` follows the app theme.

props.name: children
props.description: Collapsible content.

props.name: defaultOpen
props.description: Whether the panel starts open.

props.name: onChange
props.description: Called with the new hex value when the color changes.

props.name: value
props.description: Selected color as a hex string (controlled).

props.name: label
props.description: Field label shown above the picker.

props.name: presets
props.defaultValue:
[
  '#6366f1', // indigo  (default)
  '#7c3aed', // violet
  '#2563eb', // blue
  '#0891b2', // cyan
  '#059669', // emerald
  '#16a34a', // green
  '#d97706', // amber
  '#dc2626', // red
  '#db2777', // pink
  '#0f172a', // slate-near-black
]
props.description: Swatch presets shown for quick selection. Falls back to a default palette.

props.name: onChange
props.description: Called with the chosen value (or null when cleared).

props.name: options
props.description: Selectable options.

props.name: value
props.description: Currently selected value, or null.

props.name: clearable
props.description: Show a clear button to reset the selection.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables the input and prevents selection.

props.name: emptyMessage
props.description: Message shown when no options match the query.

props.name: inputRef
props.description: Ref forwarded to the underlying text input.

props.name: loading
props.description: Show a loading state (e.g. while fetching options).

props.name: name
props.description: Form field name for the underlying input.

props.name: onInputChange
props.description: Called as the user types — use for async/remote filtering.

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Placeholder text for the input when nothing is selected.

props.name: renderOption
props.description: Custom renderer for an option row.

props.name: size
props.description: Control size.

props.name: height
props.description: Height of the confetti canvas in px.

props.name: pieces
props.description: Number of confetti pieces.

props.name: run
props.description: Fire the confetti burst when true.

props.name: description
props.description: Body text explaining the consequence of confirming.

props.name: onClose
props.description: Called when the dialog is dismissed or cancelled.

props.name: onConfirm
props.description: Called when the user confirms the action.

props.name: open
props.description: Whether the dialog is visible (controlled).

props.name: cancelLabel
props.description: Label for the cancel button. Defaults to `'Cancel'`.

props.name: confirmLabel
props.description: Label for the confirm button. Defaults to `'Confirm'`.

props.name: destructive
props.description: Styles the confirm button as a destructive action.

props.name: typeToConfirm
props.description: When set, user must type this value to enable the confirm button.

props.name: children
props.description: Target region that opens the menu on right-click.

props.name: items
props.description: Menu entries, including separators and nested items.

props.name: copiedLabel
props.description: Label shown briefly after a successful copy.

props.name: copyLabel
props.description: Default button label.

props.name: isLoading
props.description: Show a loading spinner and disable the button while an action is in flight.

CopyField.name: CopyField
CopyField.description:
Read-only value with an inline copy action, truncation, and a hover tooltip
on the copy button. Transport-free — copies via the clipboard API only.

props.name: value
props.description: The exact string written to the clipboard.

props.name: copiedLabel
props.description: Accessible label/feedback shown right after copying.

props.name: copyLabel
props.description: Accessible label for the copy button before copying.

props.name: displayValue
props.description: Optional display override (e.g. masked or formatted). Defaults to `value`.

props.name: label
props.description: Field label rendered above the value.

props.name: monospace
props.description: Render the value in a monospace font.

props.name: size
props.description: Control size. Defaults to `'md'`.

props.name: truncate
props.description: Truncate the displayed value with an ellipsis when it overflows.

props.name: currency
props.description: ISO 4217 currency code (e.g. "USD").

props.name: onChange
props.description: Called with the parsed amount (null when cleared).

props.name: value
props.description: Amount in major units, or null when empty.

props.name: locale
props.description: BCP 47 locale for formatting. Defaults to the runtime locale.

props.name: max
props.description: Maximum allowed amount.

props.name: min
props.description: Minimum allowed amount.

props.name: columns
props.description: Column definitions.

props.name: data
props.description: Row data.

props.name: density
props.description: Row height/padding density.

props.name: editableColumns
props.description: Column accessorKey/id values that allow double-click inline editing.

props.name: filters
props.description: Per-column filter configuration.

props.name: globalFilter
props.description: Controlled global search term.

props.name: onCellChange
props.type: (rowIndex: number, columnId: string, value: string) => void
props.description: Called when an editable cell is committed.

props.name: pageSize
props.description: Rows per page; enables pagination when set.

props.name: stickyHeader
props.description: Keep the header visible while scrolling.

props.name: columns
props.description: TanStack Table column definitions.

props.name: data
props.description: Row data.

props.name: density
props.description: Row height/padding density.

props.name: emptyDescription
props.description: Description for the empty state.

props.name: emptyTitle
props.description: Heading for the empty state.

props.name: enableRowSelection
props.description: When set, table renders a checkbox column and reports row selection.

props.name: exportable
props.type: { columns?: ExportColumn<TData>[]; filename?: string; formats?: ExportFormat[]; scope?: "visible" | "all" | "selected"; }

props.name: globalFilter
props.description: Controlled global search term.

props.name: isLoading
props.description: Show a loading skeleton instead of rows.

props.name: onRowClick
props.description: Called when a row is clicked.

props.name: onRowSelectionChange
props.description: Called with the selected rows when selection changes.

props.name: pageSize
props.description: Rows per page; enables pagination when set.

props.name: toolbar
props.description: Custom toolbar rendered above the table.

props.name: onChange
props.type: ((date: Date | undefined) => void) | ((range: DateRange | undefined) => void)
props.description:
Called with the newly selected date.
Called with the newly selected range.

props.name: value
props.description:
Selected date, or `undefined` when empty (controlled).
Selected start/end range, or `undefined` when empty (controlled).

props.name: label
props.description: Field label shown above the input.

props.name: mode
props.description:
Single-date selection mode (default).
Date-range selection mode.

props.name: placeholder
props.description:
Placeholder text when no date is selected.
Placeholder text when no range is selected.

DateRange.name: DateRange
DateRange.description: A range of dates. Unlike {@link DateInterval}, the range ends are included.

props.name: label
props.description: Filter label shown on the trigger.

props.name: onChange
props.description: Called with the new range.

props.name: value
props.description: Selected range ({ from, to }).

props.name: inline
props.description: Render inline instead of inside a popover.

props.name: onClear
props.description: Called when the filter is cleared; omit to hide the clear control.

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Placeholder when no range is set.

props.name: onChange
props.description: Called with the new range on selection.

props.name: value
props.description: Selected range ({ from, to }).

props.name: inline
props.description: Render the calendar inline instead of in a popover.

props.name: locale
props.description: date-fns locale for labels and formatting.

props.name: maxDate
props.description: Latest selectable date.

props.name: minDate
props.description: Earliest selectable date.

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Placeholder for the trigger input when empty.

props.name: presets
props.description: Quick-select preset ranges shown beside the calendar.

props.name: onChange
props.description: Called with the newly selected date-time.

props.name: value
props.description: Selected date-time, or `undefined` when empty (controlled).

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Placeholder text when nothing is selected.

props.name: onChange
props.description: Called with the next range when either date or time changes.

props.name: value
props.description: Selected start/end date-time range (controlled).

props.name: endLabel
props.description: Label for the end date-time field.

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Placeholder text for the date inputs.

props.name: startLabel
props.description: Label for the start date-time field.

props.name: items
props.description: Term/description pairs to render.

props.name: layout
props.description: `stacked` puts the term above the value; `inline` puts them side by side.

props.name: data
props.description: Slice data.

props.name: nameKey
props.description: Key in each datum used for the slice label.

props.name: valueKey
props.description: Key in each datum used for the slice value.

props.name: height
props.description: Chart height in pixels.

props.name: children
props.description: Drawer body content.

props.name: onClose
props.description: Called when the drawer requests to close (backdrop, escape, close button).

props.name: open
props.description: Whether the drawer is open (controlled).

props.name: description
props.description: Optional supporting text below the title.

props.name: width
props.description: Panel width preset. Defaults to `'md'`.

props.name: sections
props.description: Grouped menu items, optionally with section headings.

props.name: trigger
props.description: Element that opens the dropdown when activated.

props.name: align
props.description: Menu alignment relative to the trigger. Defaults to `'start'`.

DropDownTree.name: DropDownTree
DropDownTree.description: Select-style trigger opening a tree picker — for hierarchical taxonomies.

props.description: Hierarchical tree nodes to choose from.

props.description: Placeholder text when nothing is selected.

props.description: Called with the updated HTML on every change.

props.name: value
props.description: Editor content as an HTML string (controlled).

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Placeholder shown while the editor is empty.

props.name: action
props.description: Primary call-to-action (e.g. a button).

props.description: Supporting text under the title.

props.name: icon
props.description: Illustrative leading icon.

props.name: size
props.description: Overall scale of the block.

props.name: columns
props.description: Column definitions controlling which fields and headers are exported.

props.description: Rows to export.

props.description: Base filename (without extension) for the downloaded file.

props.description: Export formats to offer (e.g. CSV, JSON).

props.name: name

FileItem.name: FileItem
FileItem.description:
Reusable file row with name, size, progress, status, and remove/retry
actions. Transport-free — the parent owns upload state and callbacks.

props.name: name
props.description: File name shown as the primary label.

props.name: error
props.description: Error message shown when `status` is `error`.

props.name: icon
props.description: Leading icon; defaults to a file-type glyph.

props.name: onRemove
props.description: Called when the remove button is clicked. Omit to hide it.

props.name: onRetry
props.description: Called when the retry button is clicked (shown on error).

props.name: progress
props.description: Upload progress 0–100. Shown as a thin bar when `status` is `uploading`.

props.name: size
props.description: Size in bytes. Rendered as a human-readable label.

props.name: status
props.description: Current upload state — drives the status icon and styling.

props.name: label
props.defaultValue: Click or drag files to upload

props.name: onDropAccepted
props.type: <T extends File>(files: T[], event: DropEvent) => void

props.name: validator
props.type: <T extends File>(file: T) => FileError | readonly FileError[] | null

props.name: addLabel
props.description: Label for the add-filter control.

props.name: clearLabel
props.description: Label for the clear-filters control.

props.name: savedViews
props.description: Saved-views control rendered in the bar.

props.name: condition
props.description: The single filter condition being edited.

props.name: fields
props.description: Available fields the condition can target, with their operators/types.

props.name: onChange
props.description: Called with the condition id and a partial patch when any part changes.

props.name: onRemove
props.description: Called with the condition id when the user removes it.

props.name: chips
props.description: Active filter chips to display, each removable.

props.name: clearAllLabel
props.description: Label for the clear-all control.

props.name: onClearAll
props.description: Called when the user clears all chips at once.

props.name: children
props.description: Filter controls rendered inside the popover.

props.name: label
props.description: Trigger button label.

props.name: activeCount
props.description: Number of active filters; shown as a badge on the trigger.

props.name: applyLabel
props.description: Label for the apply button.

props.name: clearLabel
props.description: Label for the clear button.

props.name: icon
props.description: Leading icon on the trigger.

props.name: onApply
props.description: Called when the apply button is pressed.

props.name: onClear
props.description: Called when the clear button is pressed.

props.name: isLoading
props.description: Show a loading spinner and disable the button while an action is in flight.

props.name: placement
props.description: Fixed corner the button is anchored to.

props.name: children
props.description:
Children may be a render function that receives the resolved field props,
or static nodes that wire themselves with {@link useFormControl}.

props.name: data
props.description: Stages from widest to narrowest.

props.name: height
props.description: Chart height in pixels.

props.name: value
props.description: Current value to display.

props.name: formatValue
props.description: Format the displayed value (e.g. add a unit).

props.name: label
props.description: Caption shown with the value.

props.name: max
props.description: Upper bound of the scale. Defaults to 100.

props.name: min
props.description: Lower bound of the scale. Defaults to 0.

props.name: size
props.description: Diameter (arc/semi) or width (linear) in pixels.

props.name: thresholds
props.description: Threshold stops — color switches when value crosses. Sorted ascending.

props.name: trackColor
props.description: Colour of the unfilled track.

props.name: variant
props.description: Visual style: arc (270° dial), semi (180° half circle), linear (horizontal bar).

props.name: value
props.description: Current value to display.

props.name: color
props.description: Fill colour of the gauge arc.

props.name: height
props.description: Chart height in pixels.

props.name: label
props.description: Caption shown with the value.

props.name: max
props.description: Upper bound of the scale. Defaults to 100.

props.name: min
props.description: Lower bound of the scale. Defaults to 0.

GradientText.name: GradientText
GradientText.description:
Gradient-filled text for premium headings and accents. Uses background-clip
so it inherits font sizing from the surrounding type scale.

props.name: animate
props.description: Animate the gradient sweep. Disabled automatically under reduced motion.

props.name: as
props.description: Render as a different element (e.g. `h1`, `h2`).

props.name: gradient
props.description: Override the gradient. Defaults to an accent → info token sweep.

props.name: columns
props.description: Fixed column count; ignored when `minChildWidth` is set.

props.name: gap
props.description: Spacing scale between grid cells.

props.name: minChildWidth
props.description: Min cell width (px) for an auto-responsive grid. Overrides `columns`.

props.name: data
props.description: Cells as [xIndex, yIndex, value] tuples.

props.name: xLabels
props.description: Column labels along the x axis.

props.name: yLabels
props.description: Row labels along the y axis.

props.name: height
props.description: Chart height in pixels.

props.name: children
props.description: Card content shown on hover.

props.name: trigger
props.description: Element that reveals the card on hover/focus.

props.name: side
props.description: Side of the trigger to position the card.

IconButton.name: IconButton
IconButton.description:
Icon-only button with an enforced accessible label. Optionally wraps itself
in a {@link Tooltip} so hover/focus surfaces the same intent visually.

props.name: isLoading
props.description: Show a loading spinner and disable the button while an action is in flight.

props.name: size
props.description: Visual + control size. Maps to the Button `icon` / `icon-sm` sizes.

props.name: tooltip
props.description: Optional tooltip; falls back to `aria-label` when omitted.

props.name: onCrop
props.description: Called with the cropped image as a `Blob` when the user confirms.

props.name: src
props.description: Source image URL or object URL to crop.

props.name: aspect
props.description: Fixed crop aspect ratio (width / height); free-form when omitted.

props.name: cropLabel
props.description: Label for the confirm/crop button.

props.name: onClose
props.description: Called when the lightbox is dismissed.

props.name: open
props.description: Whether the lightbox is open (controlled).

props.name: slides
props.description: Images to display in the gallery.

props.name: startIndex
props.description: Zero-based index of the slide shown first. Defaults to `0`.

ImagePreview.name: ImagePreview
ImagePreview.description:
Single image preview tile with remove and retry actions plus uploading/error
overlays. Transport-free — the parent owns the object URL and callbacks.

props.name: src
props.description: Image source URL or object URL.

props.name: alt
props.description: Alt text for the thumbnail.

props.name: name
props.description: Optional file name shown as a caption/overlay.

props.name: onRemove
props.description: Called when the remove button is clicked. Omit to hide it.

props.name: onRetry
props.description: Called when the retry button is clicked (shown on error).

props.name: progress
props.description: Upload progress 0–100, shown over the thumbnail while `uploading`.

props.name: size
props.description: Square edge length. Number → px, string → raw CSS size.

props.name: status
props.description: Current upload state — drives the overlay and styling.

props.name: children
props.description: The already-loaded content.

props.name: hasMore
props.description: Whether more items remain to load.

props.name: onLoadMore
props.description: Called when the sentinel scrolls into view and more items are available.

props.name: className
props.description: Extra classes for the scroll container.

props.name: end
props.description: Node shown once all items are loaded.

props.name: isLoading
props.description: True while a load is in flight — suppresses duplicate `onLoadMore` calls.

props.name: loader
props.description: Node shown while loading the next page.

InlineNotice.name: InlineNotice
InlineNotice.description:
Compact single-row feedback for forms and settings panels — lighter than
{@link Alert }. No border or fill by default, just toned text + icon.

props.name: action
props.description: Trailing action node (e.g. a small Button or Link).

props.name: dismissible
props.description: Show a dismiss button.

props.name: icon
props.description: Leading icon override; falls back to a tone-based default.

props.name: onDismiss
props.description: Called when the dismiss button is clicked.

props.name: tone
props.description: Semantic tone driving color and default icon. Defaults to `'info'`.

props.name: suffix
props.description: Trailing addon rendered after the input.

props.name: value
props.description: The value to render as an interactive JSON tree.

props.name: className
props.description: Extra classes for the viewer container.

props.name: defaultExpanded
props.description: Expand all nodes on first render.

props.name: cards
props.description: Cards, each referencing its column by id.

props.name: columns
props.description: Column definitions in display order.

props.name: onMoveCard
props.description: Called when a card is dragged to a new column.

props.name: data
props.description: Row data; each object holds the x value and every series value.

props.name: series
props.description: Series to plot, each mapping a data key to a label/colour.

props.name: xKey
props.description: Key in each datum used for the x axis.

props.name: height
props.description: Chart height in pixels.

props.name: showLegend
props.description: Show the series legend.

LoadingOverlay.name: LoadingOverlay
LoadingOverlay.description:
Contained async overlay for panels, forms, and tables. It traps nothing and
owns no data — drive `visible` from the caller's async state.

props.name: visible
props.description: Whether the overlay is shown.

props.name: blur
props.description: Blur the underlying content instead of dimming it.

props.name: children
props.description:
When provided, wraps the children in a positioned container and overlays
them. When omitted, renders only the overlay (parent must be `relative`).

props.name: label
props.description: Optional text shown beneath the spinner.

props.name: spinnerSize
props.description: Spinner size. Defaults to `'md'`.

props.name: className
props.description: Extra classes for the map container.

props.name: height
props.description: Map height in px.

props.name: markers
props.description: Pins to render on the map.

props.name: mask
props.description: Mask pattern; `9` = digit, `a` = letter, `*` = alphanumeric (e.g. "(999) 999-9999").

props.name: onChange
props.description: Called with the masked value on input.

props.name: value
props.description: Current (masked) value.

props.name: invalid
props.description: Mark the field invalid for validation styling.

props.name: label
props.description: Visible label above the field.

props.name: columns
props.description: Column groups of links shown in the open panel.

props.name: trigger
props.description: Text label for the menu trigger.

props.name: footer
props.description: Optional footer content below the columns.

props.name: onChange
props.description: Called with the new text on change.

props.name: options
props.description: Candidates shown in the mention autocomplete.

props.name: value
props.description:
Current text value, including any
@ -mentions.

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Placeholder text when empty.

MetadataList.name: MetadataList
MetadataList.description:
Compact key/value metadata grid with muted labels, optional leading icons,
and per-item copy actions. Domain-neutral.

props.name: items
props.description: Key/value entries to render.

props.name: columns
props.description: Number of grid columns.

Meter.name: Meter
Meter.description:
Usage/quota meter for dashboards — single fill or stacked segments. Uses the
native `meter` ARIA role so assistive tech reads progress correctly.

props.name: label
props.description: Visible label above the track.

props.name: max
props.description: Upper bound of the scale. Defaults to 100.

props.name: segments
props.description: Multiple stacked segments (e.g. storage by type).

props.name: showLegend
props.description: Render a legend of segment labels below the track.

props.name: size
props.description: Track thickness.

props.name: tone
props.description: Semantic colour for the single-value fill.

props.name: value
props.description: Single-value fill. Ignored when `segments` is provided.

props.name: valueLabel
props.description: Right-aligned value caption (e.g. "12 of 25 GB").

props.name: children
props.description: Dialog body content.

props.name: onClose
props.description: Called when the user dismisses the modal (overlay click, Esc, close button).

props.name: open
props.description: Whether the modal is visible.

props.name: description
props.description: Supporting text rendered under the title.

props.name: duration
props.description: Animation duration in seconds. Defaults to 0.25.

props.name: preset
props.description: Named animation preset (fadeIn, slideUp, …). Defaults to "fadeIn".

MultiColumnCombobox.name: MultiColumnCombobox
MultiColumnCombobox.description:
Combobox whose popup is a small table — search across all columns, render
structured rows. For picking entities with several identifying fields
(e.g. SKU + name + stock, employee + department + role).

props.name: columns
props.description: Column definitions shown in the dropdown grid.

props.name: items
props.description: Selectable rows, each carrying a value per column.

props.name: onChange
props.description: Called with the new selection id (or null when cleared).

props.name: value
props.description: Id of the selected item, or null.

props.name: clearable
props.description: Show a clear button when a value is selected.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disable the control.

props.name: displayKey
props.description: Column key shown in the input when an item is selected. Defaults to first column.

props.name: emptyMessage
props.description: Message shown when no items match the query.

props.name: label
props.description: Visible field label.

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Placeholder when nothing is selected.

props.name: onChange
props.description: Called with the updated selection.

props.name: options
props.description: Selectable options.

props.name: value
props.description: Currently selected values.

props.name: clearAllLabel
props.description: Label for the clear-all control.

props.name: emptyMessage
props.description: Message shown when no options match.

props.name: maxBadgeCount
props.description: Max chips to render before collapsing into a "+N" badge.

props.name: selectAllLabel
props.description: Label for the select-all control.

props.name: showSelectAll
props.description: Show a "select all" control.

props.name: size
props.description: Control size.

MultiViewCalendar.name: MultiViewCalendar
MultiViewCalendar.description:
Inline calendar showing multiple months side by side. Unlike DatePicker this
renders directly in the page (no popover) — for range dashboards, booking
flows, and availability views.

props.name: onChange
props.type: ((date: Date | undefined) => void) | ((range: DateRange | undefined) => void)
props.description:
Called with the newly selected date.
Called with the newly selected range.

props.name: value
props.description:
Selected date, or `undefined` when empty (controlled).
Selected start/end range, or `undefined` when empty (controlled).

props.name: mode
props.description:
Single-date selection mode (default).
Date-range selection mode.

props.name: months
props.description: Number of months rendered side by side. Defaults to `2`.

props.name: items
props.description: Top-level menu entries, optionally with nested children.

props.name: actions
props.description: Action controls rendered in the card.

props.name: description
props.description: Body text.

props.name: icon
props.description: Leading icon or avatar.

props.name: meta
props.description: Trailing metadata such as a timestamp.

props.name: unread
props.description: Mark as unread (adds an emphasis indicator).

props.name: notifications
props.description: Notifications to display, newest first.

props.name: emptyState
props.description: Content rendered when there are no notifications.

props.name: label
props.description: Accessible label for the panel/trigger.

props.name: maxVisible
props.description: Maximum number of items shown before scrolling.

props.name: onClear
props.description: Called when the clear-all action is pressed.

props.name: onMarkAllRead
props.description: Called when "mark all as read" is pressed.

props.name: onMarkRead
props.description: Called with an id when a single item is marked read.

props.name: onSeeAll
props.description: Called when the "see all" footer link is pressed.

props.name: onChange
props.description: Called with the parsed value (null when cleared).

props.name: value
props.description: Current value, or null when empty.

props.name: ariaLabel
props.description: Accessible name when no visible label is present.

props.name: invalid
props.description: Marks the field invalid for validation styling and `aria-invalid`.

props.name: max
props.description: Maximum allowed value.

props.name: min
props.description: Minimum allowed value.

props.name: name
props.description: Form field name, for native form submission / form libraries.

props.name: precision
props.description: Number of decimal places to enforce.

props.name: showSteppers
props.description: Show the stepper +/- buttons.

props.name: size
props.description: Control size.

props.name: step
props.description: Increment/decrement step. Defaults to 1.

props.name: suffix
props.description: Unit suffix shown inside the field (e.g. "%").

props.name: steps
props.description: Ordered tour steps, each targeting an element with content.

props.name: onClose
props.description: Called when the tour is closed or completed.

props.name: options
props.description: Driver.js config overrides (animation, labels, behavior).

props.name: run
props.description: Start the tour when true; stops/resets when false.

props.name: actions
props.description: Action controls pinned to the right of the header.

props.name: breadcrumbs
props.description: Breadcrumb trail rendered above the title.

props.name: description
props.description: Supporting text below the title.

props.name: onPageChange
props.description: Called with the new page when the user navigates.

props.name: page
props.description: Current 1-based page number.

props.name: totalPages
props.description: Total number of pages.

props.name: siblingCount
props.description: Page buttons shown either side of the current page.

props.name: collapsedSize
props.description: Panel size when collapsed; defaults to 0%.

props.name: collapsible
props.description:
This panel can be collapsed.

ℹ️ A collapsible panel will collapse when it's size is less than of the specified `minSize`

props.name: defaultSize
props.description:
Default size of Panel within its parent group; default is auto-assigned based on the total number of Panels.

⚠️ Percentage based sizes may cause slight layout shift when server-rendering.
For more information see the documentation.

props.name: disabled
props.description: When disabled, a panel cannot be resized either directly or indirectly (by resizing another panel).

props.name: elementRef
props.description: Ref attached to the root `HTMLDivElement`.

props.name: groupResizeBehavior
props.description:
How should this Panel behave if the parent Group is resized?
Defaults to `preserve-relative-size`.

- `preserve-relative-size`: Retain the current relative size (as a percentage of the Group)
- `preserve-pixel-size`: Retain its current size (in pixels)

ℹ️ Panel min/max size constraints may impact this behavior.

⚠️ A Group must contain at least one Panel with `preserve-relative-size` resize behavior.

props.name: maxSize
props.description: Maximum size of Panel within its parent group; defaults to 100%.

props.name: minSize
props.description: Minimum size of Panel within its parent group; defaults to 0%.

props.name: onResize
props.type: ((panelSize: PanelSize, id: string | number, prevPanelSize: PanelSize) => void) | undefined

props.name: panelRef
props.description:
Exposes the following imperative API:
- `collapse(): void`
- `expand(): void`
- `getSize(): number`
- `isCollapsed(): boolean`
- `resize(size: number): void`

ℹ️ The `usePanelRef` and `usePanelCallbackRef` hooks are exported for convenience use in TypeScript projects.

props.name: disabled
props.description:
When disabled, the separator cannot be used to resize its neighboring panels.

ℹ️ The panels may still be resized indirectly (while other panels are being resized).
To prevent a panel from being resized at all, it needs to also be disabled.

props.name: disableDoubleClick
props.description: When true, double-clicking this `Separator` will not reset its `Panel` to its default size.

props.name: elementRef
props.description: Ref attached to the root `HTMLDivElement`.

props.name: hideLabel
props.description: Accessible label for the reveal toggle (hide state).

props.name: revealLabel
props.description: Accessible label for the reveal toggle (show state).

props.name: showStrength
props.description: Show a live password-strength meter below the field.

props.name: data
props.description: Slice data.

props.name: nameKey
props.description: Key in each datum used for the slice label.

props.name: valueKey
props.description: Key in each datum used for the slice value.

props.name: donut
props.description: Render as a donut (hollow centre) instead of a full pie.

props.name: height
props.description: Chart height in pixels.

props.name: onChange
props.description: Called with the full code as digits are entered.

props.name: value
props.description: Current code value.

props.name: invalid
props.description: Mark the field invalid for validation styling.

props.name: label
props.description: Visible label above the inputs.

props.name: length
props.description: Number of input cells. Defaults to 6.

props.name: src
props.description: Media source URL.

props.name: controls
props.description: Show native playback controls. Defaults to `true`.

props.name: poster
props.description: Poster image shown before playback.

props.name: children
props.description: Panel content, or a render function receiving a `close` callback.

props.name: trigger
props.description: Element that toggles the popover; receives the trigger props.

props.name: align
props.description: Alignment along the chosen side.

props.name: defaultOpen
props.description: Initial open state when uncontrolled.

props.name: modal
props.description: Trap focus and block outside interaction while open.

props.name: onOpenChange
props.description: Called when the open state changes.

props.name: open
props.description: Controlled open state.

props.name: side
props.description: Preferred side of the trigger to position against.

props.name: sideOffset
props.description: Gap in pixels between trigger and panel.

props.name: anchor
props.description: Element to position the floating content against.

props.name: children
props.description: Floating content.

props.name: open
props.description: Whether the floating content is rendered.

props.name: placement
props.description: Preferred placement relative to the anchor.

props.name: external
props.description: Open in a new tab with safe rel attributes and an external icon.

props.name: muted
props.description: Use muted foreground colour instead of the accent.

props.name: value
props.description: Current progress value, from 0 to `max`.

props.name: ariaLabel
props.description: Accessible name when no visible `label` is provided.

props.name: label
props.description: Visible label rendered above the track.

props.name: max
props.description: Maximum value. Defaults to 100.

props.name: showValue
props.description: Show the numeric percentage beside the label.

props.name: children
props.description: Row value.

props.name: label
props.description: Row label.

props.name: divided
props.description: Draw a divider above the row.

props.name: labelWidth
props.description: Width of the label column when horizontal.

props.name: orientation
props.description: Layout of label vs value; inherited from the list by default.

PropertyList.name: PropertyList
PropertyList.description:
Dense label/value rows for detail panels and settings summaries.
Domain-neutral — labels and values are caller-supplied nodes.

props.name: children
props.description: `PropertyItem` children; alternative to `items`.

props.name: divided
props.description: Add dividing lines between rows.

props.name: items
props.description: Data-driven rows; alternative to passing `PropertyItem` children.

props.name: labelWidth
props.description: Width of the label column when horizontal.

props.name: orientation
props.description: `horizontal` puts label and value side by side; `vertical` stacks them.

props.name: value
props.description: Data encoded into the QR code.

props.name: label
props.description: Accessible label describing the code.

props.name: size
props.description: Module size in pixels.

props.name: categories
props.description: Axis labels around the radar.

props.name: series
props.type: { name: string; data: number[]; color?: string; }[]
props.description: Series, each a value per category with an optional colour.

props.name: height
props.description: Chart height in pixels.

RadioCardGroup.name: RadioCardGroup
RadioCardGroup.description:
Single-choice card selector for plans, roles, layouts, or preferences.
Thin preset over {@link RadioGroup} locked to the `card` variant.

props.name: onChange
props.description: Called with the newly selected value.

props.name: options
props.description: Radio options to choose from.

props.name: value
props.description: Currently selected value.

props.name: columns
props.description: Lay cards out as a fixed-column grid instead of wrapping rows.

props.name: orientation
props.description: Layout direction of the options.

props.name: onChange
props.description: Called with the newly selected value.

props.name: options
props.description: Radio options to choose from.

props.name: value
props.description: Currently selected value.

props.name: orientation
props.description: Layout direction of the options.

props.name: variant
props.description: Plain radios or selectable cards.

props.name: label
props.description: Filter label shown on the trigger.

props.name: max
props.description: Upper bound of the slider.

props.name: min
props.description: Lower bound of the slider.

props.name: onChange
props.description: Called with the new [min, max] tuple.

props.name: value
props.description: Selected [min, max] range.

props.name: inline
props.description: Render inline instead of inside a popover.

props.name: step
props.description: Step increment.

props.name: onValueChange
props.description: Called with the new [start, end] tuple as either thumb moves.

props.name: value
props.description: Current [start, end] values.

props.name: formatValue
props.description: Format thumb/value captions (e.g. add a unit or currency).

props.name: label
props.description: Visible label above the slider.

props.name: max
props.description: Upper bound of the track. Defaults to 100.

props.name: min
props.description: Lower bound of the track. Defaults to 0.

props.name: minStepsBetweenThumbs
props.description: Minimum number of steps to keep between the two thumbs.

props.name: step
props.description: Step increment between values.

props.name: value
props.description: Current rating value.

props.name: label
props.description: Accessible label for the rating group.

props.name: max
props.description: Number of stars. Defaults to 5.

props.name: onChange
props.description: Called with the chosen value; omit for a read-only display.

props.name: precision
props.description: Selectable granularity: whole or half stars.

props.name: readOnly
props.description: Render as a non-interactive display.

props.name: size
props.description: Star size.

Ripple.name: Ripple
Ripple.description:
Wraps interactive content with a material-style click ripple. Decorative and
skipped under `prefers-reduced-motion`. Keep it around buttons, list rows, or
any pressable surface.

RowActions.name: RowActions
RowActions.description:
Compact action cluster for table rows and list items. Shows up to `max`
inline icon buttons (each with a tooltip), then collapses overflow into an
{@link ActionMenu}. Domain-neutral — it never imports table primitives.

props.name: actions
props.description: Row actions; the first `max` show inline, the rest fold into a menu.

props.name: max
props.description: Number of actions shown inline before collapsing the rest into a menu.

props.name: menuLabel
props.description: Accessible label for the overflow menu trigger.

props.name: size
props.description: Size of the action buttons. Defaults to `'md'`.

props.name: links
props.type: { source: string; target: string; value: number; }[]
props.description: Flows between nodes, weighted by `value`.

props.name: nodes
props.description: Named nodes referenced by links.

props.name: height
props.description: Chart height in pixels.

props.name: currentFilters
props.description: Current filter state captured when saving a new view.

props.name: onChange
props.description: Called with the selected view (or null when cleared).

props.name: storageKey
props.description: Storage key used to persist views (legacy controlled mode).

props.name: urlKey
props.description: Query-string key the active view serializes filters into.

props.name: value
props.description: Id of the active saved view, or null (controlled).

props.name: onShare
props.description: Called with a shareable URL when the user shares a view.

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Placeholder for the view selector.

props.name: saveLabel
props.description: Label for the save-view action.

props.name: shareLabel
props.description: Label for the share-view action.

props.name: storage
props.description: Storage adapter for persisting saved views. Defaults to localStorage.

props.name: updateLabel
props.description: Label for the update-current-view action.

props.name: data
props.type: { x: number; y: number; name?: string; size?: number; }[]
props.description: Points, each with x/y and optional name and bubble size.

props.name: height
props.description: Chart height in pixels.

props.name: xLabel
props.description: Axis title for x.

props.name: yLabel
props.description: Axis title for y.

Scheduler.name: Scheduler
Scheduler.description:
Full event scheduler: day/week/month/agenda views, drag to move, drag edges
to resize, slot selection to create, optional resource lanes. Controlled —
pass events and apply changes in onEventsChange.

props.name: events
props.description: Events to render on the calendar (controlled).

props.name: onEventsChange
props.description: Called with the next events array after a drag, resize, or edit.

props.name: defaultDate
props.description: Date the calendar opens on.

props.name: defaultView
props.description: Calendar view shown on first render.

props.name: minHeight
props.description: Minimum height of the calendar viewport in px.

props.name: onEventClick
props.description: Called when an existing event is clicked.

props.name: onSlotSelect
props.type: (slot: { start: Date; end: Date; resourceId?: string; }) => void
props.description: Called when user selects an empty slot — create-event hook.

props.name: readOnly
props.description: Disable drag/resize editing.

props.name: resources
props.description: Resource lanes (people, rooms, machines) — enables resource view columns.

props.name: views
props.description: Views the user can switch between.

props.name: defer
props.description: Whether to defer the initialization to a point in time when the browser is idle. (or to the next frame if `window.requestIdleCallback` is not supported)

props.name: element
props.description: Tag of the root element.

props.name: events
props.description: OverlayScrollbars events.

props.name: options
props.description: OverlayScrollbars options.

props.name: containerId
props.description: Scroll container element id — defaults to the viewport.

props.name: rootMargin
props.description: Root margin handed to IntersectionObserver — tune when a section counts as active.

props.name: onChange
props.description: Called on every keystroke with the raw input value.

props.name: value
props.description: Current search text (controlled).

props.name: debounceMs
props.description: Debounce window in ms for `onDebouncedChange`.

props.name: onDebouncedChange
props.description: Called with the value after `debounceMs` of inactivity.

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Placeholder text for the search input.

props.name: onChange
props.description: Called on every keystroke with the new query.

props.name: value
props.description: Current query string.

props.name: clearLabel
props.description: Accessible label for the clear button.

props.name: debounceMs
props.description: Debounce window for `onDebouncedChange`, in ms.

props.name: onDebouncedChange
props.description: Called after `debounceMs` of inactivity — ideal for firing searches.

props.name: showClear
props.description: Show a clear (×) button when there is a value.

props.name: label
props.description: Optional centered label rendered within the divider.

props.name: orientation
props.description: Divider axis. Defaults to horizontal.

Shortcut.name: Shortcut
Shortcut.description:
Platform-aware keyboard shortcut display built on {@link Kbd}. Renders
`"mod+k"` as ⌘K on Apple platforms and Ctrl+K elsewhere.

props.name: keys
props.description: Combo like `"mod+k"`, `"shift+enter"`, or an array of keys.

props.name: withPlus
props.description: Render `+` separators between keys.

props.name: onChange
props.description: Called with a PNG data URL whenever the signature changes.

props.name: clearLabel
props.description: Label for the clear button.

props.name: height
props.description: Explicit height (px number or CSS length).

props.name: lines
props.description: Number of text lines to render for the `text` variant.

props.name: variant
props.description: Shape of the placeholder.

props.name: width
props.description: Explicit width (px number or CSS length).

props.name: onValueChange
props.description: Called with the updated value array as thumbs move.

props.name: value
props.description: Current thumb value(s). One entry per thumb.

props.name: formatValue
props.description: Format a raw value for display (e.g. add a "$").

props.name: label
props.description: Visible label above the track.

props.name: max
props.description: Maximum value. Defaults to 100.

props.name: min
props.description: Minimum value. Defaults to 0.

props.name: step
props.description: Step increment. Defaults to 1.

props.name: items
props.description: Items to render; each must have a stable `id`.

props.name: onChange
props.description: Called with the reordered array after a drag completes.

props.name: renderItem
props.description: Renders a single item.

props.name: data
props.description: Series values to plot.

props.name: fill
props.description: Fill the area under a line sparkline.

props.name: height
props.description: Height in pixels.

props.name: variant
props.description: Render as a line or as bars.

props.name: width
props.description: Width in pixels.

props.name: actions
props.description: Actions revealed when the dial expands.

props.name: ariaLabel
props.description: Accessible name for the trigger button.

props.name: icon
props.description: Custom trigger icon. Defaults to a plus.

props.name: label
props.description: Accessible status label announced to screen readers. Defaults to "Loading…".

props.name: actions
props.description: Secondary actions shown in the attached dropdown.

props.name: label
props.description: Label for the primary (left) button.

props.name: isLoading
props.description: Show a loading spinner and disable the button while an action is in flight.

props.name: onChange
props.description: Called with the new query on input.

props.name: onOpenChange
props.description: Called when the open state changes (Esc, overlay click).

props.name: open
props.description: Whether the spotlight overlay is open.

props.name: value
props.description: Current search query.

props.name: children
props.description: Result list rendered below the input.

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Placeholder text for the search input.

SpotlightCard.name: SpotlightCard
SpotlightCard.description:
Surface with a radial glow that follows the cursor — the signature premium
hover used by Linear/Vercel-style dashboards. Pointer-driven only, so it adds
no ambient motion.

props.name: glowColor
props.description: Glow color. Defaults to the accent token.

props.name: intensity
props.description: Peak glow opacity (0–1).

props.name: radius
props.description: Glow radius in pixels.

props.name: align
props.description: Cross-axis alignment of children. Defaults to `'stretch'`.

props.name: direction
props.description: Flex direction of the stack. Defaults to `'column'`.

props.name: divider
props.description: Element rendered between each child as a separator.

props.name: gap
props.description: Spacing scale between children. Defaults to `3`.

props.name: justify
props.description: Main-axis distribution of children. Defaults to `'start'`.

props.name: wrap
props.description: Allow children to wrap onto multiple lines.

props.name: data
props.description: Row data; each object holds the x value and every series value.

props.name: series
props.description: Series to plot, each mapping a data key to a label/colour.

props.name: xKey
props.description: Key in each datum used for the x axis.

props.name: height
props.description: Chart height in pixels.

props.name: showLegend
props.description: Show the series legend.

props.name: label
props.description: Metric name shown above the value.

props.name: value
props.description: Primary metric value.

props.name: delta
props.description: Percentage change; sign drives the up/down colour and arrow.

props.name: deltaLabel
props.description: Caption beside the delta (e.g. "vs last month").

props.name: hint
props.description: Muted helper text under the value.

props.name: icon
props.description: Leading icon.

props.name: sparkline
props.description: Series rendered as an inline trend sparkline.

props.name: pulse
props.description: Animate a pulsing ring to signal a live/active state.

props.name: tone
props.description: Semantic colour of the dot.

StatusLabel.name: StatusLabel
StatusLabel.description:
Generic status text with a leading dot or icon. Tone is token-driven and
intentionally domain-neutral — callers supply the label text.

props.name: dot
props.description: Show a leading status dot. Ignored when `icon` is provided.

props.name: icon
props.description: Leading icon; replaces the status dot when set.

props.name: pulse
props.description: Animate a pulsing ring on the dot.

props.name: tone
props.description: Semantic colour of the label and dot.

props.name: variant
props.description: `plain` is dot + text on the surface; `soft` wraps it in a tinted pill.

props.name: current
props.description: Zero-based index of the active step.

props.name: steps
props.description: Ordered steps to render.

props.name: onStepClick
props.description: Called with the step index when a step is clicked.

props.name: orientation
props.description: Layout direction. Defaults to `'horizontal'`.

SwatchPicker.name: SwatchPicker
SwatchPicker.description:
Controlled color/accent preset selector. Domain-neutral — the app wires
`value`/`onChange` to its own theme state (e.g. brand accent color).

props.name: onChange
props.description: Called with the newly selected swatch value.

props.name: swatches
props.description: Selectable swatches — hex strings or `{ value, label }` objects.

props.name: value
props.description: Currently selected swatch value (controlled).

props.name: allowCustom
props.description: Append a native color input for arbitrary values.

props.name: size
props.description: Swatch size. Defaults to `'md'`.

props.name: checked
props.description: Controlled on/off state.

props.name: description
props.description: Secondary helper text under the label.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disable interaction and dim the control.

props.name: label
props.description: Visible label rendered beside the switch.

props.name: onChange
props.description: Called with the new boolean state when toggled.

props.name: onChange
props.description: Called with the next array of on values when any switch toggles.

props.name: options
props.description: Switch options rendered as toggle rows.

props.name: value
props.description: Values of the switches currently on (controlled).

props.name: bordered
props.description: Wrap each row in a bordered settings panel.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables every switch in the group.

props.name: bulkActions
props.description: Bulk-action controls shown when rows are selected.

props.name: columnsToggle
props.description: Column visibility toggle control.

props.name: filters
props.description: Filter controls rendered in the toolbar's filter slot.

props.name: rightSlot
props.description: Arbitrary content pinned to the right edge of the toolbar.

props.name: search
props.type: { value: string; onChange: (value: string) => void; placeholder?: string; }
props.description: Built-in search box config; omit to hide the search input.

props.name: items
props.description: Tab definitions; each provides a label and panel content.

props.name: defaultIndex
props.description: Initially selected tab index when uncontrolled.

props.name: onChange
props.description: Called with the newly selected index.

props.name: selectedIndex
props.description: Controlled selected tab index.

props.name: variant
props.description: Visual style of the tab strip.

props.name: children
props.description: Tag contents (label text or nodes).

props.name: onChange
props.description: Called with the updated tag list on add/remove.

props.name: value
props.description: Current list of tags.

props.name: delimiter
props.description: Pattern that splits typed input into tags (e.g. comma/space).

props.name: maxTags
props.description: Maximum number of tags allowed.

props.name: suggestions
props.description: Autocomplete suggestions offered while typing.

props.name: validate
props.description: Validate a candidate tag; return an error string to reject it.

Tilt.name: Tilt
Tilt.description:
3D pointer-tilt surface for premium feature and pricing cards. Tilt follows
the cursor and resets on leave. Disabled under `prefers-reduced-motion`.

props.name: max
props.description: Maximum tilt in degrees.

props.name: scale
props.description: Scale applied while hovering.

props.name: onChange
props.description: Called with the new time on change.

props.name: value
props.description: Selected time ({ hours, minutes, seconds? }).

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disable the control.

props.name: hour12
props.description: Use 12-hour format with an AM/PM toggle.

props.name: label
props.description: Visible field label.

props.name: showSeconds
props.description: Show a seconds field.

props.name: onPressedChange
props.description: Called with the next pressed state when toggled.

props.name: pressed
props.description: Whether the toggle is currently pressed/active.

props.name: isLoading
props.description: Show a loading spinner and disable the button while an action is in flight.

props.name: onChange
props.description:
Called with the newly selected value.
Called with the next array of active values when any toggle flips.

props.name: options
props.description: Toggle options to render.

props.name: type
props.description:
Single-select mode — only one option active at a time.
Multi-select mode — any number of options active.

props.name: value
props.description:
The active option value (controlled).
The active option values (controlled).

props.name: ariaLabel
props.description: Accessible label for the group (maps to `aria-label`).

props.name: groups
props.description: Control groups; each inner array renders as a divided cluster.

props.name: overflow
props.description: Actions collapsed into an overflow menu.

props.name: children
props.description: The single trigger element the tooltip is attached to.

props.name: align
props.description: Alignment along the chosen side.

props.name: delayMs
props.description: Hover open delay in milliseconds.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disable the tooltip entirely.

props.name: side
props.description: Preferred side to position against the trigger.

props.name: sideOffset
props.description: Gap in pixels between trigger and tooltip.

props.name: items
props.description: All transferable items across both panes.

props.name: onChange
props.description: Called with the next array of selected ids when items move.

props.name: value
props.description: Ids of items currently in the selected pane (controlled).

props.name: availableLabel
props.description: Heading for the available (left) pane.

props.name: className
props.description: Extra classes for the component wrapper.

props.name: selectedLabel
props.description: Heading for the selected (right) pane.

TreeList.name: TreeList
TreeList.description:
Hierarchical data grid — rows expand/collapse in place while staying aligned
to columns. KendoUI TreeList equivalent for org structures, BOM tables,
account trees, and file systems.

props.name: columns
props.description: Column definitions describing how to render each cell.

props.name: rows
props.description: Hierarchical row data; each row may carry nested children.

props.name: defaultExpandAll
props.description: Expand every branch initially.

props.name: defaultExpandedIds
props.description: Ids of branches expanded on first render.

props.name: emptyMessage
props.description: Text shown when there are no rows.

props.name: onRowClick
props.description: Called when a row is clicked.

props.name: selectedId
props.description: Highlighted row id.

props.name: data
props.type: { name: string; value: number; children?: TreemapNode[]; }[]
props.description: Hierarchical nodes; size is proportional to `value`.

props.name: height
props.description: Chart height in pixels.

props.name: nodes
props.description: Hierarchical nodes to render.

props.name: defaultExpandedIds
props.description: Ids of branches expanded on first render.

props.name: onSelect
props.description: Called with the node id when a node is selected.

props.name: as
props.description: Render as a different element/component while keeping the styles.

props.name: lineClamp
props.description: Truncate after N lines with an ellipsis.

useFormControl.name: useFormControl
useFormControl.description:
Returns the ARIA wiring a control should spread onto itself so the
surrounding {@link FormControl} can connect label, helper text, and error.
Returns an empty object when used outside a `FormControl`.

props.name: items
props.description: Items to virtualize; only the visible window is rendered.

props.name: renderItem
props.description: Renders a single item for the given index.

props.name: className
props.description: Extra classes for the scroll container.

props.name: estimateSize
props.description: Estimated row height in px, used before measurement. Defaults to `44`.

props.name: height
props.description: Height of the scroll viewport (px or CSS length).

props.name: data
props.description: Steps; `type` controls running-total vs delta rendering.

props.name: height
props.description: Chart height in pixels.

Window.name: Window
Window.description:
Draggable, resizable floating window. Non-modal — page behind stays
interactive. For multi-window dashboards, tool palettes, and pop-out panels.

props.name: children
props.description: Window body content.

props.name: onClose
props.description: Called when the window is closed.

props.name: open
props.description: Whether the window is open (controlled).

props.name: initialPosition
props.description: Starting top-left position in pixels.

props.name: initialSize
props.description: Starting size in pixels.

props.name: maximizable
props.description: Show the maximize control.

props.name: minHeight
props.description: Minimum height when resizing.

props.name: minWidth
props.description: Minimum width when resizing.

props.name: onFocus
props.description: Called when the window gains focus (e.g. to raise it).

props.name: resizable
props.description: Allow the user to resize the window.

props.name: zIndex
props.description: Stack order among multiple windows.

props.name: steps
props.description: Ordered steps with their content and validation.

props.name: backLabel
props.description: Label for the back button.

props.name: completeLabel
props.description: Label for the final/complete button.

props.name: nextLabel
props.description: Label for the next button.

props.name: onComplete
props.description: Called when the final step is completed.

props.name: orientation
props.description: Layout of the step indicator.
